prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 11747→12411→11281→10422→16561，2021–2024 年整体在 10422–12411 区间波动，2025 年因云南省高考模式从"理科"改为"物理类"（选科要求变化），位次大幅后移至 16561，近 4 年累计后移约 4814 名；2025 年基准约 16561 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021–2025 年分别为 88→89→85→88→93 人，2025 年增至 93 人；2026 年计划 89 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招 4 人（-4.3%），缩招对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 56 名，近年排名在 48–61 间波动，整体稳定在中上游 211 水平；该校在声誉文件中无显著负面或正面事件记录，舆情平稳；抖音热度未进入总排名前 106 名，关注度一般，未见明显报考热度异常信号；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关专业在行业内认可度高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，对理科考生吸引力强；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数 377900 人，较 2025 年（历史类+物理类合计约 285688 人）估算增长约 32.3%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；该校位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对西南省份考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026 年计划小幅缩招（缓解竞争）、本省考生大幅增加（加剧竞争）三方面因素，缩招与考生增加效应部分抵消，预计 2026 年位次较 2025 年略有回升但仍在高位；预测最低位次约 16084 名，区间 15584–16584 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 11747→12411→11281→10422→16561. From 2021 to 2024, it fluctuated within the range of 10422–12411. In 2025, due to the change in Yunnan Province's college entrance examination model from "Science" to "Physics Category" (changes in subject selection requirements), the ranking significantly shifted backward to 16561, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4814 places over the past 4 years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 16561. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 88→89→85→88→93 respectively, increasing to 93 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 89, a slight reduction of 4 (-4.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking in 2026 approximately 56th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 48–61, overall stable at the upper-middle level of 211 universities. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation documents, and public opinion is stable. Douyin popularity has not entered the top 106 overall rankings, with general attention and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. The university has traditional strengths in geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, with related majors highly recognized in the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, strongly attracting science students. The total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in the province is 377,900, an estimated increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (history category + physics category total approximately 285,688), leading to a significant increase in candidate numbers and intensified competition. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight reduction in enrollment plan in 2026 (easing competition), and the substantial increase in provincial candidates (intensifying competition), the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate increase partially offset each other. It is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly recover compared to 2025 but remain at a high level. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 16084, with a range of 15584–16584.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (15584–16584), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Geology Base Class, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<15584), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>16584), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2074→2148→2445→2446→2496, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 422 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 2496th place; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 11→10→14→15→13 respectively, with 13 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 14, a slight expansion of 1 person (+7.7%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 56th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, fluctuating between 48th and 61st in recent years, overall stable at the upper-middle level of 211 universities; no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation file, public opinion stable; Douyin popularity not in the top 106 overall, attention level average, no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity; the university is mainly science and engineering, with relatively few liberal arts majors, overall liberal arts strength average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, it has some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces; liberal arts majors such as law, Chinese language/literature are socially popular, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 provincial general college entrance examination is 377,900, an estimated increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (history category + science category total approximately 285,688), with the history category accounting for about 39% in recent years, estimated at about 149,000 history category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 32.3% from 112,000 in 2025, a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (easing competition), and the significant increase in provincial candidates (intensifying competition), the expansion effect is insufficient to offset the competitive pressure from the increase in candidates; it is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to shift slightly backward based on 2025; predicted minimum ranking approximately 2641st, range 2166–3116th.
